_note: Tag cards used by IntentFallback embedding layer. Each entry is a 1-3 sentence natural-language expansion of the tag, used to compute tag_card embedding and cosine-match against user_prompt. New catalog tags MUST be added here (see ~/.claude/guidelines/skill-distillation.md).
